meta.title: Grok Imagine Video | AI Video Generator with Native Audio | OpenCreator
meta.description: Generate videos with audio using xAI's Grok Imagine Video on OpenCreator. Supports text-to-video and image-to-video, up to 15 seconds, multiple aspect ratios, and pay-per-second pricing.

hero.description: xAI's video generation model that can generate videos with audio. Use text-to-video or image-to-video, choose duration up to 15 seconds, and control aspect ratio and resolution with flexible pay-per-second pricing.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Discover what makes Grok Imagine Video a powerful video generation model

nativeAudio.title: Video with Audio Output
nativeAudio.description: Generate MP4 videos that can include audio. Great for cinematic short clips and social content.

lipSync.title: Text-to-Video & Image-to-Video
lipSync.description: Create videos directly from a text prompt, or animate an input image into a video with a prompt.

duration.title: Up to 15 Seconds
duration.description: Choose durations from 1 to 15 seconds depending on your use case.

flexiblePricing.title: Pay-Per-Second
flexiblePricing.description: Flexible pricing at 60 credits per second. Pay only for the duration you need, from 1 to 15 seconds.

fast.title: Resolution Control
fast.description: Select 480p or 720p output resolution for speed and cost control.

aspectRatios.title: Multi-Format Support
aspectRatios.description: Support for multiple aspect ratios including 16:9, 9:16, 1:1, and more—ready for YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram.

gallery.title: See It In Action

butterfly.useCase: Generate beautiful nature macro shots with gentle ambient sounds for peaceful content.

pricing.title: Flexible Pricing
pricing.note: Credits scale with duration: 60 credits per second. A 6-second video costs 360 credits, 15-second costs 900 credits.

0.question: What is Grok Imagine Video and who developed it?
0.answer: Grok Imagine Video is xAI's video generation model. It supports generating videos with audio from text prompts or from input images.

1.question: What makes Grok Imagine Video different from other video models?
1.answer: It supports both text-to-video and image-to-video, with controllable duration (up to 15s), aspect ratio, and resolution—plus pay-per-second pricing.

2.question: What video durations are supported?
2.answer: Grok Imagine Video supports durations from 1 to 15 seconds. You can choose any duration within this range, and pricing scales at 60 credits per second.

3.question: What resolutions and aspect ratios are available?
3.answer: The model supports 480p and 720p resolutions with 8 aspect ratios: auto, 16:9, 4:3, 3:2, 1:1, 2:3, 3:4, and 9:16. Default is 720p with auto aspect ratio.

4.question: How does the pricing work?
4.answer: Grok Imagine Video uses pay-per-second pricing at 60 credits per second. A 1-second video costs 60 credits, 6-second costs 360 credits, and a 15-second video costs 900 credits.

5.question: Can I use my own images as input?
5.answer: Yes, Grok Imagine Video supports both text-to-video and image-to-video generation. For image-to-video, provide an image URL along with your prompt to animate the image into a video.
